metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for jadecli team

plugins.name: adaptive-agent
plugins.description: Self-adapting agent bootstrap for any codebase. Auto-discovers conventions, enforces git safety, manages context, and ensures every change compounds existing effort. Built from Anthropic cookbook patterns.

plugins.name: devtools
plugins.description: macOS developer tooling installer and configurator for Claude Code workflows. Manages App Store apps, Homebrew tools, and system settings optimized for building monetizable web apps.

plugins.name: jadecli-base
plugins.description: Base plugin for all jadecli workers. Task tracking, session management, and org conventions.

plugins.name: jadecli-engineer-base
plugins.description: Engineering base plugin. Neon Postgres patterns, cron scheduling, table creation, and Vercel deploy conventions.

plugins.name: analytical-engineer
plugins.description: Analytical engineering plugin. Reporting queries, dimensional modeling, and SCD patterns.

plugins.name: frontend-engineer
plugins.description: Frontend engineering plugin. Next.js on Vercel, React patterns, and Core Web Vitals.

plugins.name: backend-engineer
plugins.description: Backend engineering plugin. API design, auth patterns, and middleware conventions.

plugins.name: middleware-engineer
plugins.description: Middleware engineering plugin. Integration patterns, message queues, and API gateway.

plugins.name: qa-engineer
plugins.description: QA engineering plugin. Test strategy, Vitest patterns, and CI/CD quality gates.
